advice.summary: You completed a solid ride of 33.69 km with a good average heart rate. Your training is on track for the Rome Half Marathon.
advice.focus: Maintain a balanced training load to avoid acute fatigue.
advice.nextSession: Plan for an easy run of 5-6 km to recover and keep your aerobic base strong.
advice.caution: Monitor for signs of fatigue due to recent acute load spikes.
